name: AsiaBaseMetals Inc.
summary: AsiaBaseMetals Inc. focuses on the exploration and development of base metals in Canada. It explores for zinc, iron, gold and silver, cobalt, and lithium deposits. The company primarily holds a 100% interest in the Gnome project consisting of 12 mineral claims covering an area of 5,868 hectares located in British Columbia. It also focuses on growing and selling cannabis for medical purposes. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
